positive: detailed scene of futuristic cityscape at dusk with neon lights reflecting off skyscrapers, central figure stands in foreground with raised arms to the sky while embracing a glowing orb that seems to pulse with energy, deep blues and purples dominate the color palette with splashes of bright pink and orange
negative: blurry background, excessive artifacts, text on figure or object, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, pixelation, and soft focus
